claims.substrate: Deligne cohomology torsion shadows from proof-class Puiseux data
claims.projection: chi_p, chi_13, lifted phase index, Bockstein carry cocycle
claims.statement: Mode 1 scoped task: test whether chain, Catalan, and Motzkin Deligne classes produce torsion examples with structural features distinguishing them from the standard Atiyah-Hirzebruch/Soule-Voisin torsion template.
boundary: Computational and structural diagnostic only until explicit finite tables and comparison gates pass.
No claim of Hodge, generalized Hodge, algebraic-cycle realization, or integral Chern bridge.
No theorem promotion without SocioSphere evidence ledger event and artifact digest.

claims.substrate: Deligne level-1 units and level-2 Deligne cup-product symbols
claims.projection: tame-symbol boundary and regulator output digest
claims.statement: Mode 1 scoped task: compute regulator outputs for level-2 Deligne cup-products on toy proof-class families and check period/L-value adjacency as diagnostics only.
boundary: Regulator computation task only until level-1 unit normalization, cup-product, tame-symbol, and output-digest gates pass.
No claim of Beilinson conjectures, L-value formula, or transcendence result.
The Bockstein carry cocycle and Deligne cup-product symbol remain distinct structures.

claims.substrate: comparison-isomorphism technique templates and mu_2 triple-point setup
claims.projection: K3 comparison proof pattern mapped to SocioProphet triple-point obstruction vocabulary
claims.statement: Mode 2 scoped task: compare the settled K3 Tate comparison-isomorphism template against the mu_2 triple-point setup and record the obstruction map.
boundary: Does not reopen the settled K3 Tate case.
Does not claim the general Tate conjecture, a Galois lift, or algebraic-cycle preimage.

gates.expected: Chain/Catalan/Motzkin table with artifact digest and torsion-order annotations.
Finite torsion-order check for candidate Deligne classes.
Comparison note against standard Atiyah-Hirzebruch/Soule-Voisin template.
Normalized pair of level-1 Deligne units.
Level-2 Deligne cup-product symbol computed without identifying it with carry.
Local boundary recorded as tame symbol.
Regulator output with digest and non-claim box.
Technique inventory of K3 Tate comparison-isomorphism proof pattern.
Mapping of comparison template to mu_2 triple-point setup.
Typed wall map: preimage, shell-map preservation, certificate.

non_claims.statement: This adapter does not claim resolution of set-theoretic foundations, incompleteness limits, or formal consistency questions.
This adapter does not promote informal proof narratives to formal theorem status.
This adapter is a boundary-governance surface, not an automated theorem prover.
This adapter does not claim Hodge or generalized Hodge.
This adapter does not claim an integral Chern-class bridge to the full Atiyah-Hirzebruch obstruction.
This adapter does not claim a Beilinson conjecture result.
This adapter does not claim transcendence, irrationality, or L-value identification from regulator numerics alone.
The Bockstein carry cocycle and the Deligne cup-product symbol are distinct and must not be identified.
This adapter does not reopen the settled K3 Tate case.
This adapter does not claim the general Tate conjecture.
This adapter does not claim an algebraic-cycle preimage or Chow input.
